summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Virtual Dressing Room MVP. All core functionality working perfectly with proper MOCKED image processing integration.
passed_tests: Backend API health endpoint (all 11 API tests passed)
Character selection and preview in dressing room
Part toggles (Upper, Lower, Shoes, Jacket, Dress, Accessories)
Apply Outfit button with mocked processing results
Quick settings switches (Precision mode, Face lock)
Navigation between all pages (Dressing Room, Character Manager, Outfit Library, Outfit Extractor, Settings)
Character Manager CRUD (Create, view, delete characters)
Outfit Library operations (View, preview, manage outfits)
Complete outfit extraction workflow (Upload → Extract → Save)
Responsive design across desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports
Edge case handling (disabled Apply button when no selection)
Image processing MOCKED integration working correctly
Sample data auto-seeding when database empty
Error handling and user feedback via toast notifications
